title: Injector
description: A vulnerable PHP login portal with user data stored in MySQL. Bypass authentication and extract the flag from the database.
longDescription:
A barebones PHP web application that talks directly to MySQL — no ORM, no parameterized queries, no input validation. The login form passes user-supplied input straight into a SELECT query, making it trivially injectable.

Your job: bypass authentication via SQL injection, enumerate the database schema, and extract the flag from a hidden secrets table.

### What you will practice
Classic in-band SQL injection, UNION-based data extraction, logical OR authentication bypass, and manual database enumeration without SQLMap.
creator: Dock & Root Labs
objectives: Bypass authentication using a SQL logic bypass
Enumerate the database schema using UNION injection
Extract the flag from the secrets table
